spec.query:
SELECT
  memtotal
FROM
  memoey
WHERE
  "host" = '$server'
ORDER BY
  time DESC
LIMIT
  1
spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  time,
  memtotal,
  memused
FROM
  memory
WHERE
  "host" = 'pve1'
ORDER BY
  time DESC

spec.query:
from(bucket: "proxmox")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "memory")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "memtotal" or r["_field"] == "memused")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["host"] == "dell2")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")
spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  time,
  memtotal,
  memused
FROM
  memory
WHERE
  "host" = 'dell2'
ORDER BY
  time DESC

spec.query:
SELECT MEAN(temp_c)
FROM smart_device
WHERE
  host = 'dell2'
  AND time >= '${__from:date}'
  AND time <= '${__to:date}'
GROUP BY time(${__interval}), device, model
spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '${__interval_ms} milliseconds', time) AS time,
  AVG(temp_c) AS value,
  device AS field
FROM
  smart_device
WHERE
  host = 'dell2'
  AND time >= $__timeFrom
  AND time <= $__timeTo
GROUP BY
  DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '${__interval_ms} milliseconds', time),
  device,
  model
ORDER BY
  time

spec.query:

spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '${__interval_ms} milliseconds', time) AS time,
  AVG(temp_c) AS value,
  device AS field
FROM
  smart_device
WHERE
  host = 'dell'
  AND time >= $__timeFrom
  AND time <= $__timeTo
GROUP BY
  DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '${__interval_ms} milliseconds', time),

  model

  time

spec.query:
from(bucket: "proxmox")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "smart_device")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "temp_c")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["host"] == "pve2")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value:r._value, _time:r._time, _field:r.device + " " + r.model}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")
spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '${__interval_ms} milliseconds', time) AS time,
  AVG(temp_c) AS value,
  device AS field
FROM

  AND time >= $__timeFrom
  AND time <= $__timeTo
GROUP BY
  DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '${__interval_ms} milliseconds', time),
  device,
  model
ORDER BY
  time

SELECT
  DATE_BIN($__interval, time) AS time,
  AVG(cpu) * 100 AS cpu,
  AVG(wait) * 100 AS wait,
  AVG(avg1) AS avg1
FROM "cpustat"
WHERE
  "host" = 'pve1'
  AND "time" >= $__timeFrom
  AND "time" <= $__timeTo
GROUP BY DATE_BIN($__interval, time)
ORDER BY time

spec.query:
from(bucket: "proxmox")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "zpool_stats")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "free" or r["_field"] == "size")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["host"] == "dell2")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["vdev"] == "root")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      r with
      _field: "used_percent",
      _value: (r.size - r.free) / r.size * 100.0
  }))
  |> yield(name: "used_percent")
spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_BIN($__interval, time) AS time,
  (AVG(size) - AVG(free)) / AVG(size) * 100.0 AS used_percent,
  AVG(free) AS free,
  AVG(size) AS size
FROM "zpool_stats"
WHERE
  "host" = 'dell2'
  AND "vdev" = 'root'
  AND "time" >= $__timeFrom
  AND "time" <= $__timeTo
GROUP BY DATE_BIN($__interval, time)
ORDER BY time

spec.query:
from(bucket: "proxmox")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "zpool_stats")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "free" or r["_field"] == "size")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["host"] == "dell")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["vdev"] == "root")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      r with
      _field: "used_percent",
      _value: (r.size - r.free) / r.size * 100.0
  }))
  |> yield(name: "used_percent")
spec.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_BIN($__interval, time) AS time,
  (AVG(size) - AVG(free)) / AVG(size) * 100.0 AS used_percent,
  AVG(free) AS free,
  AVG(size) AS size
FROM "zpool_stats"
WHERE
  "host" = 'dell'
  AND "vdev" = 'root'
  AND "time" >= $__timeFrom
  AND "time" <= $__timeTo
GROUP BY DATE_BIN($__interval, time)
ORDER BY time

spec.query:
from(bucket: "proxmox")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop:v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "cpustat" and
    r._field == "avg1"
  )
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["host"] == "pve2")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 1m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
spec.rawSql:
SELECT

FROM "cpustat"
WHERE
  "host" = 'pve2'
  AND "time" >= $__timeFrom
  AND "time" <= $__timeTo
GROUP BY DATE_BIN($__interval, time)
ORDER BY time

spec.definition:
from(bucket: "${Bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => 
    r._measurement == "system" and
    r.object == "nodes"
  )
  |> keyValues(keyColumns: ["host"])
  |> group()
  |> keep(columns: ["host"])
  |> distinct(column: "host")
spec.label: Server
spec.name: server
